full_text:
Sima Gan (Ziliang) 司馬幹 (子良)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Gan (司馬幹), styledZiliang (子良), was born in Wenxian in Henei. Intelligent but tended to only handle matters if it needed his ability. Foresaw Jin’s fall. Sima Gan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Sima Gan lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
